article.intro:
Noise works best when each message pattern is read as a full sentence.
Start from the initiator and responder roles.
Then map every token to what changes in the handshake state.
article.content:
A long viewer fixture should exercise the embedded tree with realistic payloads.
That means long URLs, multi-line text, nested records, and values that would normally be truncated in a compact tree.
Minimal mode should still keep the meaning visible even when decorative controls are reduced.
